## AI-powered content, ads, SEO, blog & website — one platform.

Five specialist AI modules. Each one an expert. All working together.

### AI Content

Brief it. AI writes, schedules, and publishes.

Describe your campaign goal and Attensify's AI generates on-brand content for every channel — then auto-publishes on the optimal schedule.

- AI writes in your brand voice
- Auto-schedules for peak engagement
- Publishes to 15+ platforms simultaneously
- Per-post performance analytics

![Content calendar showing weekly social media schedule](https://attensify.net/_next/image?url=%2Fmockups%2Fcontent-calendar.png&w=3840&q=75)

### AI Ads

AI launches and optimizes campaigns for you.

Set your goal and budget. Attensify's AI builds the campaign, writes the copy, allocates spend across Google, Meta, and LinkedIn, and tunes ROAS in real time.

- AI-written ad copy & creatives
- Autonomous budget optimization
- Automated A/B testing at scale
- Real-time ROAS dashboard

![Ad campaigns dashboard with ROAS tracking](https://attensify.net/_next/image?url=%2Fmockups%2Fads-dashboard.png&w=3840&q=75)

### AI Blog

AI researches, writes, and ranks your articles.

Give Attensify a topic or keyword. It researches the SERP, writes an SEO-optimized long-form article, and publishes — ready to rank.

- AI-generated long-form articles
- Real-time SEO scoring (target: 90+)
- Auto-generated content briefs
- Reader engagement & ranking analytics

![Blog editor with SEO scoring and AI suggestions](https://attensify.net/_next/image?url=%2Fmockups%2Fblog-editor.png&w=3840&q=75)

### AI SEO

AI finds gaps and fixes them automatically.

Attensify continuously monitors your rankings, audits technical issues, analyses competitors, and surfaces the highest-impact actions to reach page 1.

- 500+ keyword rank tracking
- Automated technical site audits
- AI competitor gap analysis
- Backlink monitoring & alerts

![SEO audit report with performance scores](https://attensify.net/_next/image?url=%2Fmockups%2Fseo-audit.png&w=3840&q=75)

### AI Website

AI builds pages that convert.

Describe the page you need. Attensify's AI generates the layout, copy, and CTAs — then runs A/B tests and tracks Core Web Vitals to keep conversion rates climbing.

- AI-generated page layouts & copy
- Autonomous A/B testing
- Core Web Vitals monitoring
- Built-in form & CTA optimization

![Website builder with drag-and-drop interface](https://attensify.net/_next/image?url=%2Fmockups%2Fwebsite-builder.png&w=3840&q=75)

## Frequently asked questions about Attensify pricing

### Is there a free plan?

Yes. The Starter plan is free forever — no expiry, no credit card required. Includes 50 AI-generated posts per month and 3 social channels.

### Can I cancel at any time?

Yes. All plans are month-to-month with no long-term commitment. Cancel or downgrade any time from your account settings.

### What platforms does Attensify publish to?

Instagram, LinkedIn, Twitter/X, Facebook, TikTok, Pinterest, YouTube, and Threads — plus Google Ads, Meta Ads, and LinkedIn Ads.

### Is Attensify suitable for marketing agencies?

Yes. The Scale plan was designed for agencies: white-label reports, multi-client management, API access, SSO, and a dedicated account manager.

### Do you offer annual billing?

Yes — annual billing is available at a discount. Contact us or select annual during checkout.

### How quickly can I get started?

Connect your social accounts and you're live in 15 minutes. The AI learns your brand voice from your existing content.

## Frequently asked questions

Who can join the Creator Programme?
+

Any content creator, marketer, or digital professional with under 50K followers on any platform. We look for authentic engagement over raw follower count.

How much can I realistically earn?
+

You earn 30% recurring commission on every paying subscriber you refer. With plans starting at $49/mo, each referral earns you ~$15/mo indefinitely. Active creators with 10K+ audiences typically earn ₹50K–₹3L per month.

How and when do I get paid?
+

Monthly payouts via bank transfer or UPI, processed on the 1st of every month. No minimum threshold — even if you earn ₹500, it gets paid out.

Do I need marketing experience?
+

Not at all. We provide ready-made content, video scripts, and creative assets. If your audience includes business owners, freelancers, or marketers — you're a perfect fit.

What happens after I apply?
+

We review your profile within 24 hours. Once approved, you get instant access to your free Growth account, unique referral link, and the full content kit.
